## Summary

<!-- What changed, and why is this the smallest useful change? -->

## Test-driven development evidence

**Red test evidence**

<!-- Show the new or changed test failing for the intended reason before the implementation. A short log excerpt or commit reference is enough. -->

**Green test evidence**

<!-- Show the same test passing after the implementation, plus the relevant regression suite. -->

## Verification

- [ ] I added or updated tests for every production behavior change.
- [ ] The full test suite passes and coverage does not fall below the repository baseline.
- [ ] SwiftLint and repository policy checks pass.
- [ ] I tested affected UI flows on an iPhone simulator or device, when applicable.
- [ ] I attached before/after screenshots or a recording for visual changes, when applicable.
- [ ] I reviewed privacy, accessibility, localization, offline behavior, and sign-in state implications.
- [ ] I did not commit credentials, cookies, signing assets, personal data, or generated build output.

## Risk and rollout

<!-- Note migrations, dependency changes, App Store/release impact, or say "None". -->
